category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Cameroon.

title.en: China-to-Cameroon EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入喀麦隆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入喀麥隆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Cameroon ANOR / ARSEL / ENEO requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, ENEO grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Cameroon's EV charging market is nascent; this matrix frames the regulatory and technical gaps honestly.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与喀麦隆ANOR / ARSEL / ENEO要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、ENEO并网要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。喀麦隆电动汽车充电市场处于起步阶段；本矩阵如实呈现监管和技术层面的差距。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與喀麥隆ANOR / ARSEL / ENEO要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、ENEO併網要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。喀麥隆電動汽車充電市場處於起步階段；本矩陣如實呈現監管和技術層面的差距。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Cameroon, the confirmed practical gaps are: (1) connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), as Cameroon follows the IEC 62196 ecosystem and GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets; (2) IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence from an accredited laboratory, since GB/T 18487 test reports are not accepted as direct IEC equivalents; (3) ANOR pre-shipment import conformity (PECAE programme) for electrical equipment; (4) ARSEL authorisation for charging-station installation and operation; (5) ENEO grid-connection coordination for installations drawing significant load; (6) EMC compliance to IEC 61000 series; (7) bilingual French/English documentation as required in Cameroon. Grid supply is 230/400 V 50 Hz, identical to China's frequency but with slightly higher nominal voltage (220/380 V China domestic), requiring voltage-range confirmation. Cameroon's EV market is very nascent and grid reliability is uneven; exporters should assess deployment feasibility and after-sales support realistically. A blanket mandatory whole-unit EVSE certification route through a single ANOR programme could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current conformity assessment route with ANOR before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入喀麦隆时，已确认的实务差距包括：(1) 接口硬件重新设计——从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因喀麦隆采用IEC 62196生态，GB/T接口在物理上与IEC 62196车辆接口不兼容；(2) 认可实验室出具的IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据，GB/T 18487测试报告不被视为IEC等效证据；(3) ANOR出口前进口合格评定（PECAE计划）适用于电气设备；(4) ARSEL对充电站安装和运营的授权；(5) 大功率安装须与ENEO协调并网；(6) 须符合IEC 61000系列EMC要求；(7) 须按喀麦隆要求提供法语/英语双语文件。电网供电为230/400 V、50 Hz，频率与中国相同，但额定电压略高于中国国内220/380 V基线，须确认电压范围。喀麦隆电动汽车市场处于非常早期阶段，电网可靠性参差不齐；出口商应切实评估部署可行性和售后支持能力。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的单一ANOR强制认证路径；出口商在出货前应向ANOR核实现行合格评定路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入喀麥隆時，已確認的實務差距包括：(1) 接口硬體重新設計——從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因喀麥隆採用IEC 62196生態，GB/T接口在物理上與IEC 62196車輛接口不兼容；(2) 認可實驗室出具的IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據，GB/T 18487測試報告不被視為IEC等效證據；(3) ANOR出口前進口合格評定（PECAE計劃）適用於電氣設備；(4) ARSEL對充電站安裝和運營的授權；(5) 大功率安裝須與ENEO協調併網；(6) 須符合IEC 61000系列EMC要求；(7) 須按喀麥隆要求提供法語/英語雙語文件。電網供電為230/400 V、50 Hz，頻率與中國相同，但額定電壓略高於中國國內220/380 V基線，須確認電壓範圍。喀麥隆電動汽車市場處於非常早期階段，電網可靠性參差不齊；出口商應切實評估部署可行性和售後支持能力。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的單一ANOR強制認證路徑；出口商在出貨前應向ANOR核實現行合格評定路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANOR scope determination, ARSEL authorisation, ENEO grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Cameroon conformity assessment rules, ARSEL authorisation requirements, ENEO grid-connection procedures, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANOR适用范围裁定、ARSEL授权、ENEO并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行喀麦隆合格评定规则、ARSEL授权要求、ENEO并网程序、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANOR適用範圍裁定、ARSEL授權、ENEO併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行喀麥隆合格評定規則、ARSEL授權要求、ENEO併網程序、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
